findings.evidence: In the PDF, page 2 begins with a table header row that includes the sub-heading 'PARTICIPATING WHOLE LIFE:' in the first column, grouping the subsequent rows. The HTML conversion omits this text entirely when merging the table, losing the explicit structural grouping.

findings.description: Minor text omission in the first column of the table (continued on page 2).
findings.evidence: The PDF contains the underlined label 'PARTICIPATING WHOLE LIFE:' in the first column, preceding 'WHOLE LIFE with Dividend Additions to Face Value'. The HTML omitted 'PARTICIPATING WHOLE LIFE:' and only output the second phrase in the <td> tag.
